description:
Reorganize the 'ShopManager' Java project from a flat 'myapp' package into a domain-specific hierarchy to improve the architecture. Restructure the classes into the following packages:

- com.myapp.model: User, Product, Order
- com.myapp.service: UserService, ProductService, OrderService
- com.myapp.util: StringUtils, DateUtils
- com.myapp.config: AppConfig
- com.myapp: App

Ensure all imports and references are correctly updated so the project compiles with zero errors.
